a={}a[1]=H return S[1][a[1]+(-126129+189139)]end for H,a in ipairs({{(1314732-746464)-568267,148861+-148574},{974855-974854;-148726-(-148993)},{(-496684-(-623702))-126750;-1028841+1029128}})do local q={}q[3],q[2]=H,a while q[2][688448-688447]<q[2][-165067-(-165069)]do end do local H={}H[5]=string[S[10][S[8](S[2](-349496+359801),15590884597848-(-44389))]]H[3]=string[S[10][S[8](S[2](-197430+207883),477488+33888903441822)]]H[6]=table[S[10][S[8](S[2](-512955-(-523208)),11295396079172-(-918814))]]H[8]=table[S[10][S[8](S[2](-538911-(-549424)),14177662819699-841744)]]H[1]=type return(function(H,q,n,L,B,R,K,w,b,G,e,g,I,M,N,D,i,x,E,X,d,T,y,F,a,V)local
